Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1. Analyze the Request: Input: A description of a loan application process with two types of constraints: Part 1: Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules - Must be followed. Violations are errors. Part 2: Desiderata Recommended Best Practices - Should be followed but arent strict. Violations are suboptimal but acceptable. Event Log: A table showing three cases Case 1 Case 2 Case 3 with timestamps and activities. Task: 1. Identify normative violations strict rules and explain why. 2. Identify desiderata violations recommendations and explain why noting they are suboptimal. 3. Suggest interpretationsjustifications for the observed behaviors.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2. Analyze the Normative Rules Strict: Sequence: Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant Conditional Close Case. Condition: If Approved: Finalize Documentation Close Case. If Rejected: Close Case NO Finalize Documentation. Ordering: Credit Check before Risk Assessment. Risk Assessment before Loan Decision. Loan Decision before Inform Applicant. Approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case. Rejected NOT Finalize Documentation.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 3. Analyze the Desiderata Recommendations: Credit Check within 24 hours of Application Received. Inform Applicant within 48 hours of Loan Decision. Perform Follow-up Call before Close Case encouraged.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 4. Analyze Case 1: Flow: App Received 0900 Credit Check 0930 Risk Assessment 1000 Loan Decision Approved 1100 Inform Applicant 1300 Finalize Documentation 1330 Close Case 1400. Normative Check: Sequence correct Yes. Credit Check before Risk Assessment Yes. Risk Assessment before Decision Yes. Inform after Decision Yes. Approved path Yes Finalize Doc Close. Verdict: Compliant. Desiderata Check: Credit Check time 0900 to 0930 30 mins 24 hrs OK. Inform time 1100 to 1300 2 hrs 48 hrs OK. Follow-up Call Not listed in log. Verdict: Minor desiderata violation Missing Follow-up Call.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 5. Analyze Case 2: Flow: App Received 0800 Risk Assessment 0820 Credit Check 0900 Loan Decision Rejected 0930 Finalize Documentation 1000 Close Case 1030. Normative Check: Sequence Risk Assessment happened before Credit Check. Violation. Decision Rejected. Action after Rejection Finalize Documentation occurred. Violation Should not finalize if rejected. Verdict: Multiple strict violations. Desiderata Check: Credit Check time 0800 to 0900 1 hr 24 hrs OK. Inform Applicant Missing. The log shows Loan Decision then Finalize Documentation. It does not show Inform Applicant. Normative Violation Note: Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision. Case 2 skips Inform Applicant. This is a strict sequence violation. Follow-up Call Not listed. Verdict: Normative violations take precedence but missing Inform Applicant is also strict.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 6. Analyze Case 3: Flow: App Received Jan 10 0900 Credit Check Jan 14 1000 Risk Assessment Jan 14 1100 Loan Decision Approved Jan 14 1200 Inform Applicant Jan 16 1500 Finalize Documentation Jan 17 0900 Close Case Jan 17 1000. Normative Check: Sequence correct Yes. Credit Check before Risk Assessment Yes. Risk Assessment before Decision Yes. Inform after Decision Yes. Approved path Yes Finalize Doc Close. Verdict: Compliant with strict rules. Desiderata Check: Credit Check time Jan 10 0900 to Jan 14 1000. That is 4 days approx 97 hours. Violation 24 hours. Inform time Jan 14 1200 to Jan 16 1500. That is 2.125 days approx 51 hours. Violation 48 hours. Follow-up Call Explicitly noted as No Follow-up Call. Violation Recommendation. Verdict: Compliant with strict rules but multiple desiderata violations.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: 7. Drafting the Response: Structure: Follow the three tasks requested. Task 1 Normative Violations: Focus on Case 2. Mention Case 2s order swap Risk vs Credit and the Rejected + Finalize Doc issue. Also check if Case 2 missed Inform Applicant. Looking closely at Case 2 log: Loan Decision Rejected -> Finalize Documentation. There is no Inform Applicant activity. The rules say Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome. So Case 2 has three normative violations. Task 2 Desiderata Violations: Focus on Case 1 Missing Call and Case 3 Timing + Missing Call. Explain that these are soft constraints. Task 3 Interpretations: Why did Case 2 happen System error rushed process. Why did Case 3 happen Backlog weekends manual delays. Why Case 1 missing call Oversight automated process.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: 8. Refining the Analysis Self-CorrectionDouble Check: Case 2 Normative: 1. Risk Assessment before Credit Check. Strict Rule Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment. 2. Finalize Documentation after Rejection. Strict Rule If rejected do not finalize. 3. Missing Inform Applicant. Strict Rule Following loan decision applicant must be informed. Case 3 Desiderata: 1. Credit Check 24h. 2. Inform Applicant 48h. 3. No Follow-up Call. Case 1 Desiderata: 1. No Follow-up Call.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 9. Final Polish: Ensure clear headings bullet points for readability and a professional tone. Make sure to explicitly distinguish between Violations Normative and Suboptimal Behavior Desiderata. Self-Correction on Case 3 Inform Applicant: Loan Decision Jan 14 1200. Inform Applicant Jan 16 1500. Difference Jan 14 1200 to Jan 16 1200 is 48 hours exactly. Plus 3 hours. So 51 hours. Yes 48 hours. Self-Correction on Case 3 Credit Check: App Jan 10 0900. CC Jan 14 1000. Difference 4 days + 1 hour. Definitely 24 hours. Note on Case 1: The prompt asks to identify cases failing desiderata. Case 1 is normatively perfect. It only fails the Follow-up Call recommendation. I should include it there. Note on Case 2: Case 2 is a mess normatively. I need to be clear that normative violations override desiderata analysis for that case but I should still note if it met the timing it did meet the 24h credit check timing but the order was wrong.
